name: sketch-workflow
description: Sketch is the FLAC 9.0 name for workflows formerly called extrusion. A sketch is a 2D design made from points, edges, blocks, and mesh controls. FLAC2D can generate zones directly; FLAC3D extrudes the sketch before creating zones.

objects.role: Named sketch collection; commands operate on the active set.
Coordinate anchors for edges and blocks.
Line or curved boundaries with zoning controls.
Closed shape meshed as regular structured or irregular unstructured mesh.
Mesh sizing, automatic zoning, and block meshing operations.

notes: FLAC2D generates zones from the 2D sketch.
FLAC3D requires extrusion/section setup before 3D zones are generated.

version_notes: In FLAC 9.0, sketch replaces the older extrude naming.
Some legacy documentation and command resources may still use extruder/extrude terminology.
